head.text: Aches, with drowsiness, worse moving in open air, better tying up head with cloth. Much fatty perspiration on head and violent itching. Seborrhœa capitis. Sick headache

stomach_abdomen.text: Pain with inclination to vomit. Bitter risings and taste. Hungry but unable to eat. Abdominal and spleenic pain

keynotes.text: color="#800000">HERACLEUM SPHONDYLIUM Hogweed (HERACLEUM - BRANCA URSINA) Recommended as a spinal stimulant; in epilepsy with flatulency, gouty and skin symptoms.
